name.en-US: Letter on the Manner of Studying (to Brother John)
name.la: Epistola ad Ioannem de modo studendi (Sexdecim Praecepta)

description.en-US: A short letter of pastoral counsel on how to acquire the treasure of knowledge — the *sixteen precepts* for study (be slow to speak, embrace purity of conscience, do not cease from prayer, often love the cell, do not seek what is too high for you, …). Traditionally addressed to John of Vercelli, Master General of the Dominicans, sometimes given to another Brother John.
description.la: Epistola brevis consilii pastoralis quomodo thesaurus scientiae acquirendus sit — *sedecim praecepta* studendi (tardiloquum esse, conscientiae puritatem amplecti, ab oratione non desistere, cellam frequenter diligere, altiora non quaerere…). Ad Ioannem Vercellensem Magistrum Generalem Ordinis Praedicatorum tradita; aliquando alio fratri Ioanni attributa.

sources.description: Standard public-domain translation, used widely in Dominican formation and in Aquinas's *Vita* editions.
Latin Leonine / Marietti edition (public domain) of the *Epistola ad Ioannem* (also known as the *Sexdecim Praecepta studendi*).

title.en-US: Letter on the Manner of Studying
